message:
fix(fsfs): harden release asset URL/checksum handling

Extracts release_asset_filename() helper to eliminate duplicated
version-stripping and extension logic between release_asset_url() and
the self-update download path. Previously the filename was constructed
independently in two places, risking drift.

Hardens extract_hash_from_sums() to properly handle common sha256sum
output quirks:
- Strips ./ prefix (standard sha256sum output on many distros)
- Strips * prefix (binary mode indicator)
- Rejects suffix-only matches that could allow a malicious
  "evil-fsfs-1.0.0-..." entry to satisfy the hash check

The old implementation used ends_with() which was vulnerable to prefix
injection in SHA256SUMS files. Now requires exact match after prefix
stripping. Adds tests for both the ./ prefix case and the suffix-only
rejection case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
